.mycelium.config.example.json.name: .mycelium.config.example.json
.mycelium.config.example.json.description: Example configuration file defining team lenses (security, finance, data, ui, api), parser rules (file globs, exclusions), and MCP server settings for Mycelium—used as a template for project-specific `.mycelium/config.json`.

README.md.name: README.md
README.md.description: Comprehensive documentation for Mycelium CLI tool, covering installation, quick start, and detailed CLI reference for commands like `init`, `serve`, `scan`, `task`, and `search`—explains how AI agents use the codebase memory graph to reduce token usage.

ui/index.html.name: index.html
ui/index.html.description: Single-page web application for visualizing the Mycelium dependency graph using D3.js, with dark theme styling, sidebar navigation (search, node info, history, legend), canvas visualization, minimap, and task session UI—served by the MCP HTTP server.

src/sessions.ts.name: sessions.ts
src/sessions.ts.description: SessionManager class that tracks bounded work sessions: captures pre-task file snapshots (line count, mtime), detects changes at task completion, computes diffs via git, and persists results to `sessions.json`—enables accurate change logging without line-by-line diffing.

src/sessions.ts::getGitDiff.name: getGitDiff
src/sessions.ts::getGitDiff.signature: function getGitDiff(projectRoot: string, rel: string): string | null

src/cli.ts.name: cli.ts
src/cli.ts.description: Main CLI entry point using Commander.js; orchestrates core commands (`init`, `serve`, `scan`, `task`) by wiring together GraphStore, Summarizer, McpServer, parser, and SessionManager—handles API key management, project config loading, and file watching.

src/cli.ts::runScan.name: runScan
src/cli.ts::runScan.signature: function runScan(root: string, store: GraphStore, config: GraphMemConfig, force = false): Promise<number>

src/cli.ts::runSummarize.name: runSummarize
src/cli.ts::runSummarize.signature: function runSummarize(root: string, store: GraphStore, config: GraphMemConfig): Promise<void>

src/cli.ts::startWatcher.name: startWatcher
src/cli.ts::startWatcher.signature: function startWatcher(root: string, store: GraphStore, config: GraphMemConfig): Promise<void>

src/bootstrap.ts.name: bootstrap.ts
src/bootstrap.ts.description: Writes `CLAUDE.md` and `.mcp.json` files into project root after first scan; `CLAUDE.md` instructs AI agents on mandatory preflight queries and graph usage rules, while `.mcp.json` auto-discovers the MCP server for Claude Code and Cursor.

src/bootstrap.ts::writeMcpJson.name: writeMcpJson
src/bootstrap.ts::writeMcpJson.signature: function writeMcpJson(workspaceRoot: string, config: GraphMemConfig): void

src/parser/treeSitter.ts.name: treeSitter.ts
src/parser/treeSitter.ts.description: CodeParser class that extracts file metadata, imports (with alias resolution from tsconfig.json), and symbol definitions (functions, classes, const arrows) from source code; produces GraphNode and GraphEdge objects for storage—core AST analysis.

src/parser/treeSitter.ts::resolveRelativ.name: resolveRelative
src/parser/treeSitter.ts::resolveRelativ.signature: function resolveRelative(fromDir: string, importPath: string): string | null

src/parser/treeSitter.ts::extractSymbols.name: extractSymbols
src/parser/treeSitter.ts::extractSymbols.signature: function extractSymbols(content: string, filePath: string, hash: string, now: number): GraphNode[]

src/parser/treeSitter.ts::edgeId.name: edgeId
src/parser/treeSitter.ts::edgeId.signature: function edgeId(from: string, kind: string, to: string): string

src/parser/detect.ts.name: detect.ts
src/parser/detect.ts.description: Auto-detects project source file globs by reading tsconfig.json `include`/`rootDir`, scanning for known directories (src, app, lib), or defaulting to root scan—enables parser to find all application code without manual config.

src/mcp/server.ts.name: server.ts
src/mcp/server.ts.description: HTTP server implementing MCP routes: `/preflight` (task-aware file recommendations), `/search` (semantic or keyword), `/dependencies` (import/call graph), `/history` (session diffs), `/task` (session lifecycle), `/xref` (cross-references), `/config` (user-editable ignore lists)—central API for agents and UI.

src/integrations/cbm-adapter.ts.name: cbm-adapter.ts
src/integrations/cbm-adapter.ts.description: Adapter bridging codebase-memory-mcp (cbm) structural graph (call graph, multi-language support) into Mycelium's store; converts cbm nodes/edges to Mycelium format and provides `traceFunction()` for /xref cross-reference queries—optional external indexing layer.

src/history/logger.ts.name: logger.ts
src/history/logger.ts.description: Tracks file changes and task context for AI agents, logging who made what changes when with debounced persistence to JSON; provides querying by task, file, or agent and generates summaries for MCP servers.

src/graph/summarizer.ts.name: summarizer.ts
src/graph/summarizer.ts.description: Batches file nodes to Claude Haiku for AI-generated 1–2 sentence descriptions and tag inference, handling API errors gracefully and parsing structured JSON responses into the graph store.

src/graph/summarizer.ts::buildSummaryPro.name: buildSummaryPrompt
src/graph/summarizer.ts::buildSummaryPro.signature: function buildSummaryPrompt(files: Array<{ nodeId: string; path: string; content: string }>): string

src/graph/summarizer.ts::parseSummaryRes.name: parseSummaryResponse
src/graph/summarizer.ts::parseSummaryRes.signature: function parseSummaryResponse(text: string, expectedIds: string[]): SummarizeResponse[]

src/graph/store.ts.name: store.ts
src/graph/store.ts.description: Persistent in-memory graph store for nodes and edges with debounced JSON serialization; supports filtered subgraph queries by team lens, dependency lookups, keyword search with stop-word filtering, and edge resolution.

src/graph/store.ts::matchGlob.name: matchGlob
src/graph/store.ts::matchGlob.signature: function matchGlob(pattern: string, filePath: string): boolean

src/graph/schema.ts.name: schema.ts
src/graph/schema.ts.description: TypeScript schema definitions for the code graph: nodes (files, functions, classes), edges (imports, calls, extends), team lenses for role-based filtering, and configuration structures for parser, summarizer, and MCP server.

src/graph/embedding-engine.ts.name: embedding-engine.ts
src/graph/embedding-engine.ts.description: Semantic vector search engine using OpenAI embeddings with SHA256 caching per node; supports single/expanded queries, similarity search, and orphan pruning with graceful fallback when API key is missing.

src/graph/embedding-engine.ts::cosine.name: cosine
src/graph/embedding-engine.ts::cosine.signature: function cosine(a: number[], b: number[]): number

src/graph/embedding-engine.ts::initEngin.name: initEngine
src/graph/embedding-engine.ts::initEngin.signature: function initEngine(myceliumDir: string, openAiKey?: string): EmbeddingEngine
